summary.intent: Add a generic webhook ingress system to Moltis that allows users to trigger AI agents from GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and other webhook sources, with full CRUD management via the settings UI.
summary.outcome: Built and merged a complete `moltis-webhooks` crate with 51 tests, gateway/HTTP integration, web UI settings page, documentation, and iteratively fixed multiple review issues including a critical OnceLock bug that silently dropped all webhook state.

repo: Settings sidebar nav icons are rendered via CSS `::before` pseudo-elements in `components.css` using `[data-section='X']` attribute selectors — NOT from the JS sections array `icon` property
There are two style.css files: `assets/style.css` (Tailwind output, gitignored) and `assets/css/style.css` (committed, older). The app serves the versioned Tailwind output via asset prefix URLs
SQLite `ON DELETE CASCADE` silently does nothing without `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON` on the connection
The codebase uses `OnceLock` for late-initialized Arc fields; `Arc::get_mut` silently fails if any clone exists and is an unreliable pattern here
CORS is not automatically applied to public/exempted routes — webhook ingress needs explicit `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` headers and OPTIONS preflight handler
Hoppscotch web app cannot reach localhost due to browser mixed-content/CORS restrictions; desktop app must be used for local testing
i18n HTML files are auto-generated via `website/scripts/build-i18n.mjs` from `index.en.html` — only edit the English source, then run the build script

The cron crate's named_session pattern (sessions keyed by `webhook:ID`) means chat UI doesn't live-refresh when background workers append messages — requires WebSocket broadcast (filed as beads issue moltis-2pu)
Webhook deliveries with same body hash were being deduplicated by the generic profile's body-hash fallback; the fix is to return `None` delivery key when no explicit idempotency header is present
The `preferredPublicBaseUrl` pattern for ngrok/tailscale URL resolution exists in `onboarding-view.js` but is not exported; pages must inline the same ngrok/tailscale status fetch logic

code.finding: Arc::get_mut silently returned None because the state Arc was cloned before the webhook fields could be set, causing webhook_store and webhook_worker_tx to remain None. Fixed by using OnceLock fields instead.
Settings nav icons use .settings-nav-item[data-section='X']::before CSS rules with mask-image SVGs, not the icon property in the JS sections array
Stripe timestamp validation originally parsed non-numeric t= values by silently skipping the check; now fails closed with AuthError on invalid timestamps
Body hash dedup fallback removed — identical payloads without idempotency headers now always go through instead of being silently deduplicated
Crash recovery must query for received + queued + processing deliveries; processing ones are mid-execution during crash and need retry
delete_webhook does explicit child deletes (deliveries, response_actions) rather than relying solely on ON DELETE CASCADE, making it robust against connection-level pragma state

workflow: Use `Arc::get_mut` only before any Arc clone exists; prefer OnceLock for fields that need late initialization on a shared Arc
Always add `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON` in run_migrations AND do explicit deletes in delete methods for SQLite cascade reliability
Webhook ingress public routes need explicit CORS headers; axum's CorsLayer applies to the whole router but individual exempted routes need manual headers
Reviewer caught the gitlab_token auth config key bug, UTF-8 truncation panic, TOCTOU in rate limiter, and secrets in API responses — these should have been caught by tests upfront
Add regression tests for every reviewer-caught bug immediately; 12 regression tests were added after the review cycle that should have existed from the start
The Changelog Guard CI check blocks any manual CHANGELOG.md edits — restore to main state when merges pull in changelog diffs

friction: OAuth token expired at session start, requiring re-authentication before work could begin
Arc::get_mut silently failed for webhook state initialization, causing a silent no-op that only surfaced during live testing (202 responses but no actual processing)
Two style.css files with different content caused confusion about which one the app serves and whether icon classes would resolve
CSS icon system requires editing components.css with data-section selectors — not discoverable from the JS sections array pattern
Hoppscotch web app fails with CORS errors for localhost, making it a misleading recommendation for local testing
The dedup body-hash fallback caused all repeated curl test requests to be silently swallowed, making testing very difficult
style.css is gitignored so new CSS icon classes added to input.css won't work in production unless the build is committed separately
GitLab auth config key was `token` but the create modal was sending `secret` — silent auth failure with no helpful error
open_items: Live-refresh chat UI when background workers append messages to already-open named sessions (filed as beads moltis-2pu) — affects both webhooks and cron
CIDR allowlist enforcement currently extracts IP from X-Forwarded-For/X-Real-Ip headers only — no ConnectInfo integration for direct connections without a proxy
Webhook translations for all 9 language files are English placeholders — need actual translations added to build-i18n.mjs
PagerDuty, Linear, Jira, and Sentry source profiles are listed in the plan but only GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and Generic were implemented
Response action tools (post GitHub comments, merge PRs, issue Stripe refunds) are described in the plan but the typed tool injection layer was not implemented
The per_entity session mode entity key extraction and serialized-per-entity processing from the plan was not implemented in the worker
The deliveries inspector UI only shows status and basic metadata — no way to see the full normalized delivery message or response actions from the UI
